SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.general_idea: Configure CookieLocaleResolver to handle user language preferences via cookies.
Configure ResourceBundleMessageSource to load localized messages from properties files.
Add LocaleChangeInterceptor to allow switching languages via URL parameter.
Register the locale change interceptor in the Spring MVC interceptor registry.
Define resource handlers for static assets and uploaded files to serve them correctly.
Implement WebMvcConfigurer interface to enable custom MVC configuration methods.
Replace in-memory ApplicationMemory storage with a database-backed LokacijaService for persistence.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.human_impl: Autowired LokacijaService and replaced memorijaAplikacije.get() calls with service.findAll(), service.save(), etc.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.general_idea: Switch from manual HTML string concatenation to Spring ModelAndView for template rendering.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.human_impl: Changed index() return type to ModelAndView and added addObject for 'lokacije' list.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.general_idea: Add functionality to upload and store location images on the server filesystem.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.human_impl: Added MultipartFile parameter, UUID filename generation, and Files.copy to 'uploads' directory.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.general_idea: Update the kontinent parameter from String to Kontinenti enum for type safety.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.human_impl: Changed @RequestParam String kontinent to @RequestParam Kontinenti kontinent.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.general_idea: Simplify view names by removing .html extension, relying on Spring ViewResolver.
Separate the edit form display (GET) from the edit submission (POST) logic.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.human_impl: Added a new GET /edit endpoint returning ModelAndView with the entity, and updated POST /edit to use service.update().

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.general_idea: Change the delete operation from POST to GET for consistency with other read-like actions or specific app design.
Remove unused imports, comments, and dead code related to the old in-memory implementation.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.human_impl: Removed imports for Lokacije, unused comments, and the details method body.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.general_idea: Change the 'Kontinent' field type from String to the 'Kontinenti' enum to enforce type safety and data integrity.
Add a new field 'putanjaDoSlike' to store the file path for location images.
Add a no-argument constructor to satisfy Spring MVC's @ModelAttribute binding requirements.
Update existing constructors to accept the new enum type and the new image path field.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.human_impl: public Lokacija(Long id, String grad, String drzava, Kontinenti kontinent, String putanjaDoSlike)

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.general_idea: Update getter and setter methods for 'Kontinent' to use the new enum type.
Add getter and setter methods for the new 'putanjaDoSlike' field.
Implement a toString method to provide a concise string representation of the object.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven project property to target Java 21 instead of Java 8.
Add Gson library for JSON serialization/deserialization.
Add Jackson Databind for JSON processing.
Add Jackson JSR310 module for Java 8+ date/time API support.
Add Jsoup library for HTML parsing.
Add Spring Boot Starter JDBC for database access.
Add jQuery UI webjar for UI components.
Update the main application class name in the Maven compiler plugin configuration.
Explicitly set Maven compiler source and target to Java 11 in the plugin configuration.
Configure Spring Boot Maven plugin to produce executable JARs.
Add JVM arguments to open java.time module for reflection access, likely required for newer JDKs.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.classpath.general_idea: Change the Eclipse JRE container reference from JavaSE-1.8 to JavaSE-11 to align the IDE configuration with the target Java version.
Add classpath entries for generated annotation sources to support modern Java build features like annotation processing.
Add classpath entries for generated test annotation sources to support annotation processing in the test scope.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.project.general_idea: Rename the Eclipse project description name from 'SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat' to 'OWP-Projekat'.
Add Spring Boot validation builder to the Eclipse project configuration.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.settings/org.general_idea: Add explicit UTF-8 encoding configuration for the test resources directory in Eclipse preferences.
Update the Java compiler target platform from 1.8 to 11 to align with the new JDK version.
Update the Java compiler compliance level from 1.8 to 11 to enforce language rules of the new JDK.
Update the Java source level from 1.8 to 11 to allow usage of new language features.
Enable generation of debug information (line numbers, local variables, source files) for better debugging support.
Configure the compiler to preserve unused local variables in debug info.
Change the reporting level for preview features from ignore to warning to alert developers about their usage.
Explicitly disable annotation processing in the compiler configuration.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/reso.general_idea: Enable Thymeleaf template engine to support server-side rendering of HTML templates.
Configure maximum file and request sizes to support large file uploads.
Define MySQL database connection properties including driver, URL, and credentials.
Disable explicit session timeout configuration by commenting it out.
Add HTTP meta tags to prevent browser caching of the page.
Introduce embedded CSS to style the form and body for better visual presentation.
Correct HTML syntax by adding missing id attributes to inputs and labels, and fixing closing tags.
Correct spelling errors in labels and option values (e.g., Drzava to Država, Antartik to Antartika).
Add a new continent option 'Okeanija' to the selection list.
Add HTTP meta tags to prevent browser caching of the form page to ensure fresh data is always loaded.
